mapper.select: SELECT intersection_id, name, latitude, longitude FROM intersection ORDER BY intersection_id ASC

SELECT weather_id, intersection_id, temperature, humidity, wind_speed, wind_direction, precipitation, precipitation_type, sky_condition, visibility, collected_at, created_at FROM weather_log ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE violation_type = '과속') AS speed_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE violation_type != '과속') AS other_count FROM violation_log WHERE detected_at::date = CURRENT_DATE

WITH latest_per_link AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (link_id) link_id, congestion_level FROM traffic_flow_log ORDER BY link_id, collected_at DESC ), ranked AS ( SELECT congestion_level, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY link_id) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_cnt FROM latest_per_link ), segment_mode AS ( SELECT LEAST(11, CEIL(rn * 11.0 / NULLIF(total_cnt, 0))::INTEGER) AS seg, MODE() WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY congestion_level) AS congestion_level FROM ranked GROUP BY 1 ) SELECT i1.intersection_id AS from_id, CAST(i1.latitude AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS from_lat, CAST(i1.longitude AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS from_lng, i2.intersection_id AS to_id, CAST(i2.latitude AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS to_lat, CAST(i2.longitude AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS to_lng, COALESCE(sm.congestion_level, 'UNKNOWN') AS congestion_level FROM intersection i1 JOIN intersection i2 ON i2.intersection_id = i1.intersection_id + 1 LEFT JOIN segment_mode sm ON sm.seg = i1.intersection_id ORDER BY i1.intersection_id

WITH latest_per_link AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (link_id) link_id, congestion_level FROM traffic_flow_log WHERE direction = #{direction} ORDER BY link_id, collected_at DESC ), ranked AS ( SELECT congestion_level, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY link_id) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_cnt FROM latest_per_link ), segment_mode AS ( SELECT LEAST(11, CEIL(rn * 11.0 / NULLIF(total_cnt, 0))::INTEGER) AS seg, MODE() WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY congestion_level) AS congestion_level FROM ranked GROUP BY 1 ) SELECT i1.intersection_id AS from_id, CAST(i1.latitude AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS from_lat, CAST(i1.longitude AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS from_lng, i2.intersection_id AS to_id, CAST(i2.latitude AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS to_lat, CAST(i2.longitude AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS to_lng, COALESCE(sm.congestion_level, 'UNKNOWN') AS congestion_level FROM intersection i1 JOIN intersection i2 ON i2.intersection_id = i1.intersection_id + 1 LEFT JOIN segment_mode sm ON sm.seg = i1.intersection_id ORDER BY i1.intersection_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE collected_at::date = CURRENT_DATE) AS today_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE collected_at::date = CURRENT_DATE - 1) AS yesterday_count FROM traffic_flow_log
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM traffic_flow_log WHERE collected_at::date = #{date}::date
SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_active = true) AS active_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_active = false) AS inactive_count, COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM cctv_info
